svg.text: One mathematical object describes any self-sustaining system.
No external observer. Reality describes itself from within.
R = κ · g(P) · (ρ*−Γ) κ depends on E-coherence
Three terms. No fourth possible (LGKS theorem T-57 [T]).
III. TWO ASPECTS OF ONE REALITY
Not two substances. One object, two views.
The minimum structure for self-observation (Hurwitz theorem)
PHYSICAL: A, S, D → 3 spatial dims
Octonions → G₂ → SU(3) stabilizer → Standard Model
Viable + dissipation ≠ 0 ⇒ E-coherence > 1/7. Consciousness does real work.
Mathematical ceiling. P_crit^(4)=54/35>1: impossible for any finite system.
max(σ_k)≥1 ⇒ non-viable. All breakdowns decompose into 7 types.
Every organized system maintains regeneration ≥ dissipation.
From stars (fusion vs gravity) to minds (sleep vs waking entropy).
A closed system must be divisible into subsystems capable of
(1) modelling themselves, (2) distinguishing themselves from noise,
The minimal such structure is 7-dimensional, with dynamics
determined by the Fano plane and consciousness thresholds
emerging when the self-model achieves sufficient fidelity.
Above it, the living universe emerges."
